channel.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India
channel.description: World News Today: Read the latest world news headlines, Current International breaking news world wide. In depth analysis and top news headlines world wide.

image.title: World News, Today World News, Latest International News, World Breaking News, Trending News of World - Times of India

item.title: 10 largest island countries in the world: Indonesia, Japan, Papua New Guinea among the biggest island nations
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Economic Fury' on Iran: US seizes Tehran's biggest crypto network amid peace talks
item.description: The US has imposed sanctions on Iran's largest cryptocurrency exchange, Nobitex, and its executives, accusing them of aiding the Iranian government and sanctioned entities in bypassing Western restrictions. This move, dubbed 'Economic Fury,' aims to increase economic pressure on Tehran amid ongoing conflicts.
item.dc:creator: TOI Business Desk

item.title: Watch: Air defence battle over Kuwait as Patriot missiles respond to Iranian strike
item.description: Middle East tensions flared as Iran launched missiles targeting US facilities in Kuwait and Bahrain, which were intercepted or failed to hit. The US responded with strikes on an Iranian military site. This escalation follows a major US military campaign against Iran earlier this year, with ongoing exchanges and stalled negotiations pushing the region towards wider conflict.
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: "Bitcoin is garbage": Clavicular's brutal Bitcoin takedown sparks outrage and mockery across crypto world
item.description: Controversial streamer Clavicular sparked widespread backlash after calling Bitcoin "garbage" and a "horrible investment" during a viral livestream. He argued that the cryptocurrency lacks intrinsic value and claimed its biggest gains are already behind it. His comments drew criticism from crypto supporters, who defended Bitcoin's growing institutional adoption and long-term potential. The rant also revived discussions about Clavicular's past disagreements with fellow streamer Sneako and previous crypto-related controversies.
item.dc:creator: Barsha Dutta

item.title: Who is LowTierGod? Dale Wilson turns heads with rare court victory amid alleged doxxing dispute
item.description: LowTierGod, whose real name is Dale Wilson, is trending after reportedly winning a California family court case without a lawyer. Wilson received a three-year restraining order against the mother of his child over alleged harassment and sharing of personal information. The court outcome sparked major discussion across social media, with fans and critics debating the surprising legal victory.
item.dc:creator: Sehjal Gupta

item.title: LowTierGod reportedly secures restraining order against mother of his child
item.description: Fighting game streamer LowTierGod has reportedly secured a restraining order against the mother of his child following a civil court hearing. Despite attending without legal representation, the streamer convinced the judge of harassment and unwanted contact. The order's specifics remain undisclosed, but the ruling has sparked significant online discussion within the gaming community.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Indian man to be deported from New Zealand after being caught in underage sex ring, says he would face stigma back home
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: TheBurntPeanut responds to Fortnite collab rumors after Epic teaser sparks debate
item.description: Speculation is rife about a Fortnite collaboration with streamer TheBurntPeanut after a teaser image featured a peanut-shaped character. While the streamer denies any knowledge, his avatar sporting a similar hat and a reported confirmation from an Epic Games director have fueled fan excitement. However, some players have raised concerns over past controversial remarks by the streamer, urging a cancellation.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Jailed Agusta middleman’s son calls for his release; questions additional charges, cites Nirav Modi case
item.description: Christian Michel's son, Alois, urges India to release his father, citing the AgustaWestland case and comparing it to Nirav Modi's extradition. He argues Michel has served maximum time for bribery and additional charges violate India's Extradition Act. The family seeks UK government intervention, while London assures consular support and engagement with India.
item.dc:creator: NAOMI CANTON

item.title: Good news for Indian travelers: No transit visa required for layover at airports in Germany
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: MrBeast viral pilot Jabari Brown reportedly facing international investigation tied to alleged 577 pound cannabis seizure
item.description: Jabari Brown, the pilot who became famous after winning a private jet in a MrBeast YouTube challenge, has been arrested in Paraguay in a drug trafficking investigation. Authorities said nearly 577 pounds of cannabis were allegedly found connected to a private aircraft arriving from Miami. Three other US nationals were also detained as Paraguay officials continue investigating the international case.
item.dc:creator: Sumit Roy

item.title: Mathematical model decodes how ambitious you should be. It's not what conventional wisdom says
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Quote of the day by Barack Obama: “You can’t let your failures define you – you have to let them…”
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Most powerful queen of Europe unearthed after 700 years: Archaeologists finally opened the tomb of Queen Elisenda in Barcelona
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Iran was building conventional shield': Rubio defends US war against Tehran at Senate hearing
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Is IShowSpeed replacing Shakira as the face of FIFA World Cup music? Fans cannot stop talking about viral anthem
item.description: IShowSpeed’s new song “World Cup (Champions)” has become a major viral hit before FIFA World Cup 2026. Fans across social media praised the track and compared it to FIFA’s official anthem featuring Shakira and Burna Boy. The song gained millions of views within hours, while FIFA’s response on X added even more excitement around the growing online buzz.
item.dc:creator: Global Sports Desk

item.title: Iran inflation hits highest level since World War II. Is another crisis brewing?
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: Billionaire Mark Cuban exposes American healthcare: Why one MRI costs $2,500 while another costs just $350
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk

item.title: 'Dumocracy' in America: When the President becomes a punchline
item.dc:creator: Chidanand Rajghatta

item.title: 'Where is the outrage?' MAGA up in arms as Southampton student Henry Nowak's last words revealed; 'I can't breathe'
item.dc:creator: TOI World Desk
